chapters.title: Basic Probability Concepts
chapters.transcript: Sample space, events, probability axioms. P(A) between 0 and 1. Sum over all outcomes equals 1.

chapters.title: Random Variables and Distributions
chapters.transcript: Discrete (Bernoulli, Binomial, Poisson) and continuous (Uniform, Gaussian, Exponential) random variables. PDF and CDF.

chapters.title: Expectation, Variance, Covariance
chapters.transcript: Expected value is average. Variance measures spread. Covariance measures linear relationship between two variables.

chapters.title: Bayes' Theorem
chapters.transcript: P(A|B) = P(B|A)P(A)/P(B). Bayesian inference updates beliefs with data. Naive Bayes classifier.

chapters.title: Law of Large Numbers and CLT
chapters.transcript: Sample mean converges to true mean. Central Limit Theorem: sum of many iid variables approaches normal distribution.
